werewolf-dapp.description: B2B SaaS platform connecting business owners with developers through an API-first ERP, integrated payment processing, and blockchain/DeFi. The current flagship — successor to the older werewolf-* web apps.
werewolf-dapp.next: Ongoing business/admin features (latest: audited admin override).

daedalus.description: An AI-native Infrastructure Operating System — one control plane to observe, operate, and evolve infrastructure via dashboard, CLI, API, and an embedded AI agent with a live knowledge graph.
daedalus.next: dctl connector work (e.g. SSH server registration).

control-room.description: The Open Autonomous Operations Platform — an AI control plane where AI proposes, deterministic systems execute, everything is observable, and an operator can approve/reject from dashboard, REST API, or Telegram. Phase 0 (alpha).
control-room.next: Build out Phase 0 foundation (alignment gate, eventbus, stack, CI).

aurora.description: A research-grade AI chat in your terminal, opening with the 6-module Aurora Research Method. Engine-agnostic (Claude + Codex, switchable via /engine) with a two-way Telegram bridge.
aurora.next: Fix per-session engine/model persistence; replace the opening voice questionnaire with starting templates.

leads-search-skill.description: Standalone cold-outreach pipeline for Werewolf Solutions: find local businesses, scrape + audit sites, draft personalised emails, send, and AI-triage replies. WhatsApp fallback + do-not-contact list. Runs as CLI and local web app.
leads-search-skill.next: Make emails/messages more human; surface fuller company details (Google Maps link) on the draft-&-approve page.

AI-social-media-autopilot.description: AI social-media manager that creates, schedules, and optimises content across platforms. Transitioning to a multi-tenant agency architecture with workspace isolation and RBAC.
AI-social-media-autopilot.next: Complete deploy steps; finish multi-tenant transition.

workflow.description: Hosts wfq, a Rust release-queue CLI, plus its web UI. Ships from master, developed on short-lived version branches.
workflow.next: Merge outstanding cto-branch work back to a version branch.

handymanservices.description: A professional, SEO/GEO-optimised website for a handyman business in Birmingham, UK.
handymanservices.next: Finalise copy/SEO/GEO + cookie & privacy; wire main fields to real business data from the API.

manu-ncc-website.description: Full-stack site for 'NCC Ghidoni Emanuele', an Italian taxi/NCC (chauffeur) service in Albugnano, Italy. Monolithic Express backend + React front end.
manu-ncc-website.next: Add a theme context; enhance styling and modern-site SEO.

local-lift.description: LocalLift — a web app for local-business growth (multi-step onboarding, admin, persisted data). See HANDOVER.md for run/deploy details.
local-lift.next: Real case studies on the inspiration step; logo + socials; confirm required vs optional fields per step.

dao-project.description: The WLF DAO: WLF token and governance smart contracts. Deliberately kept separate from a Companies House company.

trading-bot.description: Trading-bot software for the Werewolf app: Express + SQLite backend running the bots, plus a web SPA to configure strategies, bots, and exchange credentials. Auto-migrating SQLite on first boot.
trading-bot.next: Resume from the pre-merge cto sync.

accounting.description: @werewolf-solutions/accounting — personal-finance library: budgeting, daily earning targets, and crypto capital-gains tax using the UK HMRC pooling method.
accounting.next: Maintain as needed — small, stable library.

ultimate-app.description: A multi-project MERN workspace with docs, tasks, files, and a project-scoped AI assistant.
ultimate-app.next: Auth (JWT/refresh/roles), RBAC + multi-tenant orgs, docs vault CRUD/search.

bedrock-forge.description: A voxel / block-based game engine (block system, camera system, etc.), built on .NET with Godot. A side/creative project rather than a business tool.
bedrock-forge.next: Continue engine systems per its own docs/.

blog.description: The Werewolf Solutions dev blog — a builder's log about putting a whole business stack (governance, token, ERP) on Ethereum, written as it's built.

todo.description: Planning/roadmap repo for the Werewolf ecosystem — dated milestones (Companies House, staking, token sale, DAO, testnet deploys) with pass/fail tracking.

github-api.description: A Node script that fetches commit data from the GitHub API for repos in the Werewolf-Solutions org (outputs contributions.json, raw_commits.json).
github-api.next: Run when you need fresh org commit data.

mock-server.description: An Express mock API for local development, including a Stripe plugin (create-payment-intent) and mock user/inventory data.
mock-server.next: Extract hardcoded fixtures into mocks/; add /api/health; validate Stripe request bodies.

qr-gen.description: A simple Python GUI app that generates QR codes from URLs or text, exporting PNG and SVG.

qr-pay.description: Early QR-payment prototype (bare package.json). Parked experiment.
qr-pay.next: Decide whether to fold into a real payments feature or drop.

qr-mobilepay.next: Decide whether to fold into a real payments feature or drop.

ai-assistant.description: A parked idea — only a notes.md so far, no code.

dao-project-hardhat.note: Earlier Hardhat version of the DAO project.
